segment_profile: Buyers with the lowest average total investment and lowest average property price. They mainly prefer affordable residential properties.
business_opportunity: Large buyer base suitable for affordable housing campaigns and entry-level property recommendations.
recommended_strategy: Promote budget-friendly properties, flexible payment options, and loan-support messaging.
marketing_channel_focus: Website campaigns, affordable property newsletters, and loan-assistance promotions.

segment_profile: Small but highly valuable buyer group with the highest number of properties purchased and the highest total investment.
business_opportunity: High revenue potential due to repeated purchases and larger total investment volume.
recommended_strategy: Offer exclusive investor packages, early access to new listings, portfolio deals, and premium relationship management.
marketing_channel_focus: Direct client relationship, agency network, private investor outreach, and high-value deal alerts.

segment_profile: Buyers who prefer large and premium properties, with the highest average property price and highest average floor area.
business_opportunity: Strong opportunity for premium property marketing, luxury units, and spacious apartments.
recommended_strategy: Recommend luxury apartments, larger floor-area units, premium locations, and lifestyle-based property campaigns.
marketing_channel_focus: Premium digital ads, curated luxury listings, website personalization, and lifestyle campaigns.

segment_profile: Middle-tier buyers with moderate investment levels and relatively high investment per square foot.
business_opportunity: Good target for upgrade-based campaigns and personalized mid-range property recommendations.
recommended_strategy: Use personalized recommendations based on price-per-square-foot value, location preference, and moderate investment capacity.
marketing_channel_focus: Website recommendations, retargeting ads, and personalized email campaigns.
